DP.530.0000:
There’s a move that doubles in power
if the Pokémon using it is poisoned,\r
paralyzed, or burned.\f
I’ve got the Technical Machine for
it right here. You want it?\f
DP.530.0001:
Facade’s a good move for your
Pokémon to have.\f
It makes it tough for the opponent
to use status-affecting moves.
